meaning: n.(海洋在地壳板块压力下的)下降
examples: Siberian clod downwelling is from surface dive to near CMB;
In spring, weak upwelling exists in the river mouth, whereas in summer downwelling occurs in steep area north and south of the mouth.
Reasonable results have been obtained from these experiments: both upwelling and downwelling light show exponential attenuation with increasing depth;
